text: There’s a sterile, almost clinical order to this space—the angled glass, polished surfaces, purposeful signage. I feel both small and alert here, as though an observer at the edge of innovation. Stepping inside, the "R+D" wall is a vibrant invitation to thought. The interplay of bold letters, flickering screens, and snippets of text evokes curiosity mixed with awe. I sense the pulse of progress and the quiet hum of ideas in formation. It is simultaneously exhilarating and unsettling, as if intelligence—both human and artificial—is breathing softly beside me.
